[Southern Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 389/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC. NORTHEAST OF RUEGEN
EXPLOSIVES FOUND IN POSITIONS
54-54,38N 013-52,34E,
54-53,72N 013-48,80E,
54-53,70N 013-54,00E,
54-53,60N 013-54,06E,
54-53,44N 013-47,29E,
54-51,70N 013-54,68E,
54-49,50N 013-55,43E,
54-35,32N 013-49,16E,
54-34,73N 013-49,27E,
54-34,20N 013-49,37E,
54-34,04N 013-49,42E AND
54-33,55N 013-49,51E.
ANCHORING AND FISHING PROHIBITED WITHIN
A RADIUS OF 100 METRES.
CANCEL NAVIGATIONAL WARNING NO. 388
